title: Obsidian Just 10x’d Everyone’s Hermes Agent
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to connect Hermes Agent with Obsidian, enabling AI agents to work within the Obsidian note-taking platform. The integration is framed as a significant performance improvement ("10x'd") for agent workflows.
writeup: David Ondrej walks through connecting Hermes Agent to Obsidian, framing the integration as a 10x improvement to the agent's capability. The tutorial covers AI agent deployment and integration practices, and it points to hosting and educational resources for AI development. The takeaway is a concrete workflow for pairing an AI agent with Obsidian, situated within broader topics of agent orchestration and IDE integration.
